components.name: trend_fetcher
components.purpose: Polls YouTube Data API for trending videos, hashtags, and audio signals

components.name: trend_analyzer
components.purpose: Scores and ranks fetched trends; predicts 48–72h peak window

components.name: script_generator
components.purpose: Calls Anthropic Claude to produce a monetizable script from trend data

components.name: clip_assembler
components.purpose: FFmpeg pipeline: selects footage, adds voiceover, subtitles, and licensed music

components.name: upload_manager
components.purpose: Authenticates via OAuth and uploads finished video to YouTube

components.name: job_queue
components.purpose: Celery + Redis: schedules and tracks async jobs across all components

components.name: database
components.purpose: PostgreSQL models: trends, scripts, jobs, and channel configuration

components.name: dashboard
components.purpose: Main UI: trend feed, job status, and channel settings

components.name: auth_ui
components.purpose: Google OAuth login and channel connect flow
